title: Cell Fixation for Transmission Electron Microscopy Analysis
author: Debora Ferreira Barreto-Vieira
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jqucmww

steps.title: Wash monolayer with Phosphate-buffered saline (PBSx1) for 3 times
steps.instruction: Wash monolayer with Phosphate-buffered saline (PBSx1) for 3 times.

steps.title: Add enough trypsin to cover monolayer
steps.instruction: Add enough trypsin to cover monolayer.

steps.title: Add enough fetal bovine serum (FBS)...
steps.instruction: Add enough fetal bovine serum (FBS) to cover the monolayer in order to inhibit trypsinization process.

steps.title: Dislodge cells from plastic substrate by...
steps.instruction: Dislodge cells from plastic substrate by slapping the side of the flask with the heel of your hand a few times.

steps.title: Aliquot cells in microcentrifuge tubes containing...
steps.instruction: Aliquot cells in microcentrifuge tubes containing 500 µl of glutaraldehyde 1% diluted in sodium cacodylate buffer 0,2M.
